channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年03月16日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: 斯塔默称英国不会卷入“更广泛战争”
item.description: Comment from British prime minister comes as German government warns of danger of ‘never-ending’ conflict

item.title: 迪拜机场遭无人机袭击，阿联酋航空调整航线
item.description: Flights from Manchester, Edinburgh and Dublin among those that returned to destinations on Monday

item.title: 肖恩·潘弃奥斯卡颁奖礼赴乌克兰访问
item.description: The actor, who did not attend the ceremony to receive his award for best supporting actor for his role in ‘One Battle After Another,’ instead decided to travel to Europe, according to The New York Tim

item.title: 散户从私募信贷金矿撤资数十亿
item.description: Flood of redemptions threatens to stall one of Wall Street’s most important sources of growth

item.title: 美银Francisco Blanch解析油价达200美元路径
item.description: Francisco Blanch, head of commodities and derivatives research at BofA Securities, sees the risks of recession growing “by the week” if the Iran war continues into April and May. Blanch says, “The war

item.title: 无醇啤酒与宠物美容纳入通胀衡量指标
item.description: Houmous and motorhomes are also added to the basket of goods and services used to chart the rising cost of living.

item.title: 摩根大通启动57.5亿美元贷款出售，关联EA收购
item.description: Wall Street banks led by JPMorgan Chase & Co. kicked off a $5.75 billion cross-border leveraged loan sale to help finance the buyout of video game maker Electronic Arts Inc., one of the largest tr

item.title: 国际清算银行：杠杆ETF狂潮加剧白银暴跌
item.description: The worst silver sell-off in history at the end of January was accelerated by the growing footprint of retail investors in leveraged exchange-traded funds, according to the Bank for International Sett

item.title: 厄瓜多尔部署7.5万军警打击毒品团伙
item.description: Citizens of the most violent-wracked provinces have been warned the government is "at war" with the gangs.

item.title: 英国企业雇24岁以下失业者可获3000英镑
item.description: It comes as ministers grapple with spiralling unemployment rates among young people.

item.title: 霍尔木兹海峡：战争结束后仍将长期困扰世界
item.description: Iran has shown that control of the strait gives it a stranglehold over the world economy

item.title: 钢厂日运营成本高达130万英镑
item.description: The government spent £377m to keep British Steel's Scunthorpe site operating, according to a report.

item.title: 缅甸亲军方政党主导议会五年后复会
item.description: New parliament opens for the first time since the 2021 coup after elections that excluded major opposition parties.

item.title: 高市称暂无派遣自卫队赴霍尔木兹护航计划
item.description: The prime minister said such an operation would be legally “very difficult,” adding that Japan had not been asked to join a coalition to help secure vessels in the waterway.

item.title: 英国清洁能源目标推进受阻
item.description: Our economy remains highly fossil fuel-dependent partly because we are not electrifying in the desired way

item.title: 内塔尼亚胡对手竞相对伊朗示强
item.description: Israel’s opposition parties criticise PM’s management of war even if they express strong support for offensive

item.title: 德黑兰居民告诉BBC：伊朗正采取措施防抗议
item.description: Residents describe new security checkpoints around the capital, where they say people are stopped and searched.

item.title: 乌克兰在金融前线的紧急战斗
item.description: The war-torn country is battling to secure crucial funding from the IMF and EU, as well as putting up taxes.

item.title: 南非警方：吹哨人谋杀案嫌疑人为前精英警官
item.description: Marius van der Merwe was shot dead three weeks after accusing police officers of killing a robbery suspect.

item.title: Apollo洽谈以40亿欧元估值入股Syntegon
item.description: Apollo Global Management Inc. is in talks to buy a significant minority stake in Syntegon, the German packaging machine maker owned by CVC Capital Partners Plc, people with knowledge of the matter sai

item.title: 法国公民在阿塞拜疆因间谍罪被判10年监禁
item.description: Martin Ryan was accused of collecting secret information about Baku's military co-operation with Turkey and Pakistan.

item.title: 保障数字资产安全 抵御未来威胁

item.description: Here's what happened inside the winners room and other insights from the biggest night in Hollywood.

item.title: 吹哨人称TikTok与Meta为算法竞赛牺牲安全
item.description: Companies allowed more harmful content on user’s feeds, knowing their algorithms ran on outrage, BBC hears.

item.title: 印度医院ICU火灾致10人死亡
item.description: All the victims of the fire in Odisha state are patients, and 11 hospital staff are being treated for burns.

item.title: MTN汇率反弹后派发股息 股价大涨
item.description: MTN Group Ltd. rose the most in two months as Africa’s largest wireless carrier returned to profit, declared a dividend that beat estimates and said it plans to buy back shares.

item.title: 美国团体如何在英国驱动新一代反堕胎运动
item.description: The killing of Charlie Kirk galvanised a transatlantic campaign against abortion. But will it succeed in shifting Britain's pro-choice consensus?

item.title: 简报：AI如何用于军事目标锁定及五角大楼对Claude之战

item.title: 纸币、海狸与一场典型的英国式反弹
item.description: Politicians are furious Churchill will be replaced on banknotes. The RSPCA wants rats and pigeons to feature.
